description: Curated built-in kubectl provider for common resource workflows and targeted dynamic lookup.

flags.summary: Watch for changes after listing.
Output format.
Selector to filter on.

subcommands.name: describe
subcommands.summary: Show details of a specific resource or group of resources.

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.summary: Delete resources by file names, stdin, resources and names, or by resources and label selector.

flags.summary: Immediately remove resources from API and bypass graceful deletion.
Period of time in seconds given to the resource to terminate gracefully.

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.summary: Print the logs for a container in a pod.

flags.summary: Specify if the logs should be streamed.
Print the logs of this container.

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.summary: Execute a command in a container.

flags.summary: Pass stdin to the container.
Stdin is a TTY.
Container name.

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.summary: Apply a configuration to a resource by file name or stdin.

flags.summary: Filename, directory, or URL to files to use to create the resource.
If true, apply runs in the server instead of the client.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.summary: Create a resource from a file or from stdin.

flags.summary: Filename, directory, or URL to files to use to create the resource.

subcommands.name: use-context
subcommands.summary: Set the current context in a kubeconfig file.

subcommands.name: set-context
subcommands.summary: Set a context entry in kubeconfig.

subcommands.name: rollout
subcommands.summary: Manage the rollout of a resource.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.summary: Show the status of the rollout.

subcommands.name: deployments
subcommands.summary: Show rollout status for a deployment.

subcommands.name: image
subcommands.summary: Update image of a pod template.

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.summary: Update environment variables on a pod template.

subcommands.name: edit
subcommands.summary: Edit a resource on the server.

subcommands.name: port-forward
subcommands.summary: Forward one or more local ports to a pod.

flags.summary: Addresses to listen on.

subcommands.name: cp
subcommands.summary: Copy files and directories to and from containers.

subcommands.name: scale
subcommands.summary: Set a new size for a deployment, replica set, or stateful set.

flags.summary: The new desired number of replicas.

subcommands.name: annotate
subcommands.summary: Update the annotations on a resource.

flags.summary: Allow annotations to be overwritten.

subcommands.name: label
subcommands.summary: Update the labels on a resource.

flags.summary: Allow labels to be overwritten.
If present, the namespace scope for this CLI request.
The name of the kubeconfig context to use.
Path to the kubeconfig file to use.
List the requested object(s) across all namespaces.
Output format.
